message:
fix(drasi): show demo counts in stats overview (#7859)

When no live Drasi API is connected, the Sources/Queries/Reactions stat
cards showed "—" instead of demo values, making the dashboard look broken
in demo mode. Return 3/4/1 demo counts that match the demo pipeline
rendered in DrasiReactiveGraph.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
